---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new dashboard feature or data extension
title: "[FEATURE] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what should the dashboard do that it doesn't today? -->

## Motivation / use case
<!-- Who benefits and why? e.g. journalist, researcher, resident, advocate -->

## Proposed implementation
<!-- Optional: describe how you'd build it. Links to libraries, data sources, etc. -->

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- How do we know it's done? -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Priority / category
<!-- Delete all that don't apply -->
- Map UX (hover, search, layer toggle)
- Chart / filtering (year slider, rate normalization)
- New data dimension (lawsuit tracker, consent decrees, etc.)
- Accessibility / a11y
- Performance
- API / data export
- Documentation
